utterances.speaker: Mike
utterances.text: Ok , so it is a tie again , 41 to 41 .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: No , I have just to have two more points to beat him !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Monica , that was also true an hour ago !

emotion_cause.span: 4_that was also true an hour ago !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I can not just walk away ! I have put in four hours !

emotion_cause.span: 5_I can not just walk away ! I have put in four hours !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: You knew this about me when you married me !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: You agreed to take me in sickness and in health .
